description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a combination of matte black and orange-brown components, reminiscent of an AK-style firearm. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are all rendered in a wood-like orange color, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine area are finished in black, suggesting a metal construction. The rifle has a fixed stock and a standard-length barrel with a simple front sight post and a rear notch sight. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, integrated seamlessly into the lower receiver. The overall form is streamlined, with minimal external attachments or modifications, and the surface finish is mostly matte with subtle textural details. The rifle's proportions and features indicate it is designed for practical use, likely in urban or tactical scenarios.
description: A matte black and orange-brown rifle with a fixed stock, standard barrel, and detachable box magazine, featuring classic AK-style elements and a streamlined, practical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, handguard, and barrel with front sight.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the stock, grip, and handguard visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the butt of the fixed stock and the slim width of the rifle.
